title: LMS Orientation Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the LMS basics.

questions.text: Which framework is this LMS built with?
questions.explanation: This LMS is built with Astro.build, a modern static site generator.

questions.text: This LMS is hosted on GitHub Pages.
questions.explanation: GitHub Pages is used for static hosting.

questions.text: Name one content type available in this LMS.
questions.explanation: The LMS supports encyclopedia entries, courses, notes, presentations, and quizzes.
